package.name: duco_cartesian_control
package.description: Cartesian-controller setup + operator orchestration for the Duco GCR5_910 arm. Spawns FZI's cartesian_force_controller into the live controller_manager, relays the gravity-compensated wrench onto the controller's RELIABLE input, publishes a zero target_wrench heartbeat, exposes engage/disengage Trigger services that atomically swap arm_1_controller and the FZI controller, and runs a safety supervisor that auto-disengages on stale topics or excessive force/torque. The actual Cartesian compliance hot path is the C++ plugin from https://github.com/yizhongzhang1989/cartesian_controllers (a fork of fzi-forschungszentrum-informatik/cartesian_controllers). The system runs without any dashboard; cartesian_controller_dashboard is a separate, optional package.
